data.description:
## Why
Every prompt/detector change in this epic must be measured, or we repeat dso's mistake of
uncalibrated drift. This is the gating foundation: no prompt story merges without a passing eval.

## What
Build eval specs for the four-pass code-review prompts (base, overlays, verify) in the existing
rebar eval harness. Seed two families from dso's documented corpus:
- NO-FIRE cases (must not flag): sourced-bash functions, subdirectory scripts, list-form subprocess,
  Rule-5 structural greps on declarative artifacts, moved-code renames with callers updated,
  already-public config reads, valid observable-postcondition tests.
- SEEDED-DEFECT recall cases (must flag): tautological test, dangling deletion, asymmetric signature
  change, hallucinated API, VCS conflict marker, ticket scope drift.
Deterministic gating scorers (a deterministic scorer GATES; an llm-judge only REPORTS).

## Scope
Eval specs + fixtures under src/rebar/llm/evals and eval_specs; no gate behavior change here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval specs exist for base, verify, and at least the tests+security overlays.
- [ ] No-fire and recall case families seeded from the dso incidents listed above.
- [ ] At least one deterministic gating scorer per spec; specs pass on the current gate as baseline.
- [ ] The nit-framing experiment result (positive-framing recall lift) captured as a case.
data.title: Eval foundation for the four-pass code-review prompts
